description:
The date for which data is provided. 
Could be start of week, or month, or quarter.
The count of items sold
The revenue obtained out of sold items
Average selling price (preferably weighted average)
Region for which the sales and spends is provided
Brand for which the sales and spends is provided
Category for which the sales and spends is provided
Flag as 1 if some promotional offer is going on in that time period, else 0
Consumer Price Index - to capture macro economic factor
Inflation percentage - to capture macro economic factor
Marketing spend made on TV
Total ad spots given within the time period
Metric for TV ad efficiency/audience reached. Reach (%) × Frequency.
Marketing spend made on Newspaper
Total newspaper ads print within the time period
Marketing spend made on Magazine
Estimated reach of the magazine
Marketing spend made on Radio
Total ad spots given within the time period
Estimated audience reached
GRP of the radio ad
Marketing spend made on Out of Home means like Billboards

Footfall at the mall on days of Ad/Promotion
Marketing spend made on Cinema Ads or Movie Hall Ads
Reach of cinema or screening count
Marketing spend made on Facebook
Number of times a facebook post reached user's screen
Number of times an ad was clicked (even from same user)
Unique number of people/user who's screen was reached by the Facebook Ad/Post
